name: Potato Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine flour, baking powder, and salt. Cut in butter until the mixture resembles coarse meal.
2. Beat eggs lightly; reserve 1 tablespoon.
3. Stir the reserved egg into the dry ingredients along with milk and potatoes until well moistened.
4. Knead gently on a lightly floured surface about 20 times.
5. Roll or pat into a circle that is 1/2 inch thick.
6. Place onto an ungreased baking sheet. Brush with reserved egg yolk and sprinkle with additional sugar.
7. Cut into 16 wedges, slightly separating them.
8. Bake in a 425°F oven for 12 to 15 minutes, or until lightly browned. Makes: 16 Scones
Variations: Raisin Scones - Add 3/4 cup raisins with dry ingredients; Oat Scones - Use 1/2 cup rolled oats instead of 1/2 cup flour.
